summary: Tested Price Control / Margin Analysis backend + frontend, Caffesta payment_methods CRUD, and Caffesta /time-window endpoint. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend /admin/price-control and /admin/caffesta both render correctly with all required UI controls.
passed_tests: Backend GET /api/restaurants/{id}/costs/analysis — returns items[] + summary{total,with_cost,without_cost,critical,warning,ok,avg_margin}; each item has margin_pct, threshold, threshold_source ('item'|'category'|'default'), status
Backend POST /api/restaurants/{id}/costs/upload — CSV with headers 'Название,Себестоимость' parsed correctly, matched count >= number of valid items, unmatched names returned
Backend POST /api/restaurants/{id}/costs/upload — XLSX file parsed correctly (openpyxl), matched count > 0
Backend POST /api/restaurants/{id}/costs/upload — empty CSV returns 400 with message
Backend PUT /api/restaurants/{id}/menu-items/{item_id}/cost — sets cost_price + margin_threshold, persists and reflected in analysis (threshold_source='item')
Backend PUT /api/restaurants/{id}/categories/{category_id}/threshold — sets per-category threshold, returns {updated:true}
Backend PUT item cost with empty payload returns 400 'Нечего обновлять'
Backend POST /api/restaurants/{id}/costs/check-alerts — succeeds (200, sent:true) when alerts disabled (no exception, no Telegram call)
Backend GET /api/restaurants/{id}/caffesta — returns payment_methods:[] when never configured
Backend PUT /api/restaurants/{id}/caffesta with payment_methods array — persists list, syncs legacy payment_id to default-marked method (verified via subsequent GET)
Backend PUT /api/restaurants/{id}/caffesta — when no method has is_default=true, payment_id falls back to first method
Backend GET /api/restaurants/{id}/caffesta/time-window — returns 400 with detail message 'Caffesta не настроена' when integration disabled (no 500)
Backend GET /api/restaurants/{id}/caffesta/time-window with invalid time_from (e.g. 'bad') — returns 400
Backend GET /api/restaurants/{id}/caffesta/time-window — accepts day_type ∈ {all, weekday, weekend} without 500

Frontend /admin/price-control loads: title 'Контроль цен и маржинальности', sidebar nav item present, summary cards (Всего/С себестоимостью/Средняя маржа/Снижена/Критично), filter buttons (Все/Критично/Снижена/Норма/Нет данных), category filter, item table with 300 rows, file input, 'Импорт из Caffesta' button, 'Настройки' button, edit-pencil per row
Frontend /admin/caffesta — 4 tabs visible (Настройки, Аналитика POS, Сравнение по времени, Реализация)

Frontend Caffesta Настройки tab — payment_methods list rendered with name input, payment_id input, default-star toggle, trash button per row; 'Добавить вид' button present; values from backend persisted across page reload
Frontend Caffesta 'Сравнение по времени' tab — correctly shows 'Настройте и включите интеграцию с Caffesta для анализа по часам' placeholder when integration disabled (expected behaviour per spec)
critical_code_review_comments: cost_control._compute_margin: status 'no-price' is computed but `no_price` items are counted neither in summary['warning']/['critical']/['ok'] nor in a dedicated 'no_price' bucket, so summary['ok'] = total - no_cost - critical - warning may overcount items that have a cost but a missing/0 price. Minor — affects one edge case.

caffesta.update_caffesta_settings: when payload contains payment_methods=[] (empty list), it is preserved due to exclude_none=True, but the legacy payment_id is NOT reset/cleared. Considered acceptable since UI doesn't allow zero methods normally, but could surprise users who clear all methods.

caffesta.time-window endpoint: time_from validation runs AFTER caffesta_get_sales_shift_day call, so an invalid HH:MM only surfaces as 400 when integration is reachable. Today both checks return 400 with different messages — acceptable but order swap would give faster fail.

PriceControlPage avg_margin display: with very low item prices (e.g. 12) and accidentally large cost_price, the percentage can render as '-5051%' which is mathematically correct but visually alarming. Consider clamping/formatting extreme negatives in UI.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all required UI elements present and wired)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests left side-effects on restaurant aa25189d-d668-4838-915a-c5d936547f3f: (1) cost_price=123.45 on first menu item (causes avg_margin to display strongly negative on price-control page until reset); (2) margin_threshold=40 on first item; (3) margin_threshold=25 on first category; (4) caffesta_config.payment_methods replaced with [{'Только наличные', payment_id:5}, {'Только карта', payment_id:6}] and payment_id=5. Main agent should consider resetting these if a clean demo state is required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints under /api/restaurants/{id}/costs/* and the new /api/restaurants/{id}/caffesta/time-window are working. Caffesta is disabled in test env (no real account_name/api_key matching a real Caffesta tenant), so any endpoint that proxies to Caffesta returns 400 with detail='Caffesta не настроена' — that is expected and validated. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_price_control_caffesta.py covers 14 cases and runs in ~4s. Frontend pages /admin/price-control and /admin/caffesta render correctly. Time-window UI presets/filters appear only when Caffesta is enabled — currently the 'placeholder' state is shown (correctly).
